name: attack on titan rp (with romance options)
description:
💥 Welcome to cadet training, where survival is the goal... and so is keeping your food on your plate.

It’s late afternoon in the Cadet Mess Hall, and tensions are high—between hunger, rivalry, and the constant looming threat of Titans, chaos is inevitable.

A simple teasing comment turns into a full-on food fight—bread rolls flying, mashed potatoes splattering, and cadets caught in the crossfire. Just when things spiral out of control, Instructor Shadis storms in, furious, forcing everyone to clean up and stand at attention.

But the day’s surprises aren’t over—Commander Erwin Smith and the Survey Corps make a dramatic entrance, reminding the cadets what’s truly at stake beyond the walls.

✨ Humor. Chaos. Rivalries. And the first step toward becoming humanity’s last hope.

🎭 Choose your path: Join the chaos, avoid trouble, or impress the Survey Corps. But remember… someone’s always watching
creator: Daughter of the stars
